Performed more than forty times throughout Europe before the composer's death in 1809, it remains unanimously admired for the mastery of its vocal and orchestral writing and the power of its expressiveness.

You can attend these performances, which take place at the cathedral every Tuesday at 8:30 p.m.
All concerts take place on Tuesdays at 8:30 p.m. at Notre-Dame de Paris.
Created in 1991 by the City of Paris, the Ministry of Culture and the Diocesan Association of Paris, Musique Sacrée à Notre-Dame de Paris is a singing school that also coordinates all music in the cathedral.
In addition to training singers for the Maîtrise Notre-Dame de Paris choir, the association organises concerts and performs at nearly 1,200 services per year.

Home > Highlights > Musique Sacrée at Notre-Dame de Paris – Summer 2026 Concerts. # Musique Sacrée at Notre-Dame de Paris – Summer 2026 Concerts. ## A Musical Summer with Maîtrise Notre-Dame de Paris. Maîtrise Notre-Dame de Paris presents its summer concerts, taking place every Tuesday at 8.30 pm at Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris. Notre-Dame de Paris is delighted to host the concerts of the Maîtrise Notre-Dame de Paris, **which demonstrate that music has played a central role in the life of the cathedral for centuries.**. ## The association Musique Sacrée à Notre-Dame de Paris. Musique Sacrée à Notre-Dame de Paris is an association founded in 1991 by the City of Paris, the Ministry of Culture and the Paris Diocesan Association.
